---
name: "Future Ideas"
about: Document a future idea or backlog item.
title: "[Idea]: "
labels: ["idea", "backlog"]
assignees: []
---

## Description
<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of the idea. -->

## Context/Inspiration
<!-- Where did this idea come from? Any references or background info? -->

## Expected Value
<!-- What is the expected value or impact of implementing this? -->

## Initial Implementation Thoughts
<!-- Any initial thoughts on how this could be implemented? -->

## Readiness (graduation)
<!-- An idea is a pre-Definition-of-Ready discovery item by design. It carries no Acceptance Criteria, Definition of Ready, or Definition of Done yet; it graduates to a Definition of Ready and a Definition of Done at refinement (/solomon-refine) once promoted to the backlog. Do not force a Definition of Ready onto a raw idea. -->
- [ ] Promote to the backlog before defining a Definition of Ready or Definition of Done
